title: Main Account Restart Persistence Guard
changes: Main account isolated save writes canonical, last-good and compatibility mirrors.
Main account status endpoint self-heals from last-good/options mirrors after restart.
Startup verifies/re-mirrors Main account persistence before options are used.
Adds redacted persistence check file for diagnostics.
Includes 5.13.42 Backpack price schema deep sync fix.
safety: No secrets are returned by status/debug endpoints.
